name: accuracy
label: Accuracy
summary: Average number of correctly applied labels.
description: Average number of correctly applied labels.

name: f1
label: F1 score
summary: The [F1 score](https://scikit-learn.org/stable/modules/generated/sklearn.metrics.f1_score.html) is a weighted average of the precision and recall over all class labels, where an F1 score reaches its best value at 1 and worst score at 0, where each class contributes to the score relative to its frequency in the dataset.
description: The [F1 score](https://scikit-learn.org/stable/modules/generated/sklearn.metrics.f1_score.html) is a weighted average of the precision and recall over all class labels, where an F1 score reaches its best value at 1 and worst score at 0, where each class contributes to the score relative to its frequency in the dataset.

name: f1_macro
label: Macro F1 score
summary: The macro F1 score is an unweighted F1 score, where each class contributes equally, regardless of its frequency.
description: The macro F1 score is an unweighted F1 score, where each class contributes equally, regardless of its frequency.
